steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The word Yet sets up a contrast: while many artists follow Laura Les's formula, Arca is presented as an exception. She “incorporates Latin rhythms into the hyperpop sound” — the crucial phrase showing modification within the form, not abandonment.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Arca's method is to blend a distinctive element (Latin rhythms) with the hyperpop framework, creating divergence without separation. C captures this—her music differs from the typical sound but stays grounded in hyperpop.

The other three either suggest abandoning hyperpop entirely, introduce unsupported influences, or reverse the causal relationship.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
